title: IntentRL: Clarifying Latent User Intent for Deep Research Agents via Two-Stage Reinforcement Learning

defines.name: IntentRL
defines.definition: A two-stage reinforcement learning framework that trains deep research agents to proactively clarify latent user intent before long-horizon research execution.

problem: Deep research agents are costly and time-consuming, and they often execute ambiguous queries without clarifying the user's latent intent, leading to off-target reports and wasted computation.
